The Photographer

Built for Every Moment

Taylor John is an Orlando-based photographer, videographer, and editor with a gift for storytelling and capturing timeless memories. From high-energy sporting events and aerial drone shoots to intimate family portraits and automotive detail work — Taylor does it all, and does it right.

Shooting on Sony with G Master prime lenses and a DJI drone, every frame is intentional. Not just pictures — moments frozen in time, edited with precision and delivered with purpose.
